name: Kintavar Exploration Inc.
description: Kintavar Exploration Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company primarily engaged in the acquisition, assessment, exploration, and development of gold and base metal properties. The company focuses on generating and advancing projects, with a strong emphasis on sediment-hosted copper-silver deposits, particularly within the Grenville geological province of Quebec. Kintavar specializes in identifying and exploring under-evaluated mining properties, aiming to build a diversified portfolio of assets with significant resource potential. Recently, the company has undergone a corporate transition, rebranding to Auriginal Mining Corp. to better reflect its expanded strategic focus in the mining sector.
